system: Answer the following question concisely and truthfully. If you are not sure, say so.
response: In 2012, CERN (the European Organization for Nuclear Research) announced the discovery of a new particle consistent with the Higgs boson. This discovery was made using the Large Hadron Collider (LHC) and was officially announced on July 4, 2012. The finding was a major milestone in particle physics, confirming a key part of the Standard Model.
